name: Harfang Exploration Inc.
summary: Harfang Exploration Inc., an exploration and evaluation stage company, primarily acquires and explores for gold properties in Canada. The company focuses on the exploration and evaluation of its mineral properties in the James Bay area in the Province of Qu√É¬©bec for precious metals. It also explores for copper, silver, nickel, zinc, chromium, and PGE metals. The company is headquartered in Montreal, Canada.
